title: quercus grisea
intro: Quercus grisea, also known as the gray birch or paper birch, is a species of birch tree native to North America. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, derived from its leaves and bark. The health benefits of Quercus grisea include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Quercus grisea can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, with the bark often being used to create a decoction that can be consumed for its medicinal properties.
